title: Wendy Lucio
text:
I’m a Credit Risk & Analytics professional with 6+ years of experience in the Mexican banking industry, currently pursuing an MSc in Business Analytics at DCU in Dublin, Ireland.
My background spans credit risk management, portfolio analytics, and data-driven decision making across top Mexican banks including Scotiabank and Banorte, where I led a team as Deputy Director of Credit Risk.
I combine strong technical skills — Python, R, SAS, SQL, Power BI — with deep business knowledge, and I’m passionate about how fintechs like Revolut and Nubank are reshaping the financial industry.




📊 Credit Risk Modelling — scorecards, PD models, vintage analysis
🤖 Machine Learning — classification, clustering, predictive analytics
📈 Portfolio Analytics — TDC, Auto, Personal Loans, Mortgage
👥 Team Leadership — managed cross-functional teams of 5
